message:
fix(plan): harden validation and fix compensation resume state logic

Add version gate rejecting plans newer than PLAN_SCHEMA_VERSION. Add
second validation pass for step-level StepCompleted precondition
references (previously only plan-level refs were checked). Fix
reconstruct_tx_resume_state() which incorrectly populated
compensated_step_ids unconditionally — now only marks steps compensated
when compensation actually succeeded.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
